sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10405" key="a)nti/prasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίπρᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10405.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contract of sale executed by the purchaser, PLond. ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2227</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iv A.
